narrative: Jindal Stainless is the strongest absolute water performer in FY2022-23, with the lowest total withdrawal and consumption at 11.68 million kL, and the best turnover intensity at 0.0335 L/₹. JSW is strongest on discharge because it reports zero total water discharge, while Jindal reports only 5,400 kL. Tata appears as the laggard in absolute withdrawal, consumption and discharge, but the year is not like-for-like because Tata FY2022-23 is flagged as consolidated and includes international operations; the most visible distortion is seawater discharge of 243.23 million kL. SAIL sits mid-pack on absolute withdrawal and consumption but has large discharge to groundwater in FY2023. For management interpretation, FY2022-23 is best used as a directional baseline rather than a hard peer benchmark for Tata because Tata’s reporting boundary differs from the Indian standalone basis used for peers.
